name: pi-gsd
description: Get Shit Done - Unofficial port of the renowned AI-native project-planning spec-driven toolkit

scripts.prepublishOnly: node scripts/build-harnesses.js --clean && chmod +x .gsd/bin/agent/gsd-tools.cjs && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); ['scripts/postinstall.js','.gsd/bin/agent/gsd-tools.cjs','.gsd/bin/agent/lib/core.cjs'].forEach(f=>{if(!fs.existsSync(f)){console.error('ERROR: required file missing: '+f);process.exit(1);}});"; echo 'pre-publish checks passed'
scripts.prebuild:harnesses: echo Building harness tree from repo mirrors...

author: Alessio Corsi
